final_files.tests/test_product_parent_final.py:
import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path

import pytest

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def database():
    connection = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    for name in ("inventory_catalog.sql", "availability_view.sql"):
        connection.executescript((ROOT / "sql" / name).read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    return connection


def populated_database():
    db = database()
    db.execute("INSERT INTO merchant VALUES (1, 'North Shop')")
    db.execute("INSERT INTO product VALUES (1, 'BOWL-8', 'Serving bowl')")
    db.execute("INSERT INTO stock VALUES (1, 'BOWL-8', 6)")
    return db


def test_product_with_stock_cannot_be_deleted_into_an_orphan():
    db = populated_database()
    with pytest.raises(sqlite3.IntegrityError):
        db.execute("DELETE FROM product WHERE merchant_id = 1 AND sku = 'BOWL-8'")
    assert db.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock").fetchone()[0] == 1


def test_product_identity_cannot_change_away_from_existing_stock():
    db = populated_database()
    with pytest.raises(sqlite3.IntegrityError):
        db.execute("UPDATE product SET sku = 'BOWL-9' WHERE merchant_id = 1 AND sku = 'BOWL-8'")
    assert db.execute("SELECT product_name FROM available_stock").fetchone()[0] == 'Serving bowl'
